note: Web wallet UI for Sealed Capsule prepared for V13 @ block 12,000 (Fase Sealed-1.C-1). When the user picks Sealed Note / Sealed Document Reference / Sealed Structured Data, a new gold panel appears titled 'SEALED CAPSULE — Prepared for V13 @ block 12,000' with the live chain height, a recipient public key field (66 hex chars, compressed 02/03), and an inline status line that turns red on length/format error, amber when format is fine but pubkey can't yet be cross-checked against the address, and green ('hash160 matches') when ripemd160(sha256(pubkey)) == recipient pkh. The status updates live as the user types either the pubkey or the recipient address. The Send button still REFUSES sealed broadcast even when every gate clears: 'Sealed Capsule ECIES is pending cross-language test vectors. It is prepared for V13 but not enabled for broadcast yet.' Sealed via sost-cli still works (C++ ECIES landed in Fase Sealed-1.A). Public-mode capsules unaffected. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO TX wire format, NO sighash, NO CLI, NO node touched.
